title: Nezriti Organization
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Organization |image= |name=Nezriti Organization |type=Criminal{{CSWECite|II|377|Nezriti Organization}} |founder= |leader= |subgroup= |headquarters= |locations= |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|I have a petition from the Nezriti Organization. They wish an alliance with Black Sun.''"
"''I'm sure they do.|Mayth Duvel and Prince Xizor|[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]}} The '''Nezriti Organization''' was a criminal group that operated during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of the [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] to [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]]. shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], the Nezriti Organization sent a petition of alliance to [[Dark Prince|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]], [[Underlord]] of the powerful [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] crime syndicate. To curry Xizor's favor, the Nezriti overture included a gift: a [[Tumanian pressure-ruby]], an extremely rare [[Gemstone/Legends|gemstone]] easily worth several million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].{{CSWECite|III|267|Tumanian pressure-ruby}} Black Sun servant [[Mayth Duvel]] delivered the petition in the form of a small package to Xizor within the [[Prince/Legends|prince's]] [[Xizor's Palace|private sanctum]]. Xizor nodded at the offering before casually tossing the gemstone onto his desk and instructing Duvel to inform the Nezriti that he would consider their proposal. ==Behind the scenes== The Nezriti Organization was first mentioned in the [[1996]] novel [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'']], written by [[Steve Perry]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1stm|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Criminal organizations]]
